contextSummary: shadcn/ui v4's Base UI foundation: the canonical dialog and sheet wrappers under registry/bases/base/ui, restyled into eight distributed style variants (base-vega, base-lyra, ...) plus an RTL variant, copy-pasted into thousands of apps.
rankRationale: The single most-consumed Base UI dialog wrapper in existence: shadcn/ui v4's base registry implements Dialog and Sheet on Base UI and fans them out into eight style variants plus RTL. A recomposed story would show the canonical wrapper recipe (Portal > Backdrop > Popup with data-state styling) that thousands of apps copy verbatim; feeds the doc's 'real-world examples' and 'anatomy/composition' sections and anchors the shadcn migration narrative.

contextSummary: User-management platform whose admin SDK drives ~25 CRUD/confirm dialogs (invite member, add domain, change plan) from module-level Dialog.createHandle()/AlertDialog.createHandle<Payload>() handles re-exported by its Apsara design system; views open dialogs imperatively with typed payloads.
rankRationale: The richest createHandle deployment found: ~25 admin dialogs (invite member, verify domain, confirm plan change) opened imperatively from module-level handles, several with typed payloads, mixing Dialog + AlertDialog + Menu handles in one view. Recomposes into the definitive detached-triggers story (click row action -> handle.open(payload) -> form -> submit -> toast -> close); feeds prop-level guidance for handle/createHandle and the forms-in-dialog section.

contextSummary: Gutenberg's new packages/ui builds its Dialog as one file per Base UI part; the Root wrapper's JSDoc encodes house rules: every dialog must have a Title, always show a visible close affordance, and omit the X icon for destructive-choice dialogs.
rankRationale: WordPress's new ui package wraps each Dialog part in its own file and embeds house a11y/content rules in JSDoc: Title is mandatory, close affordances must be visible, destructive flows should drop the X icon so 'X vs Cancel' is unambiguous. That prose is ready-made evidence for the docs' content-guidance and do/don't sections, from one of the most scrutinized OSS codebases.

contextSummary: Oxide's cloud console wraps Dialog twice: a fully-controlled centered Modal (isOpen/onDismiss, no Trigger -- routes and state open it) and a SideModal drawer sliding from the edge, with motion animations and deliberate z-index rules for modal-over-side-modal.
rankRationale: Two contrasting compositions in one high-craft codebase: a fully-controlled Modal with no Trigger (state/routes open it) and a SideModal drawer on the same Dialog primitive, with motion animations and explicit z-index policy for modal-over-side-modal. Recomposes into 'controlled dialog without a Trigger' and 'drawer from dialog' stories; feeds behavior (controlled vs uncontrolled) and when-to-use-drawer guidance. MPL-2.0 keeps code reusable.

contextSummary: Theo's t3.codes hosts its cmdk-style command palette inside a Base UI Dialog (Backdrop + Viewport + Popup, opened via createHandle) alongside a full shadcn-style dialog/sheet pair -- the command-palette-host pattern end to end.
rankRationale: Command palette hosted in a Dialog, the exact pattern Base UI's own docs hint at: Backdrop + Viewport + Popup with createHandle to open from anywhere (Cmd+K). Live at t3.codes with MIT license; recomposes into a 'command palette host' story (press Cmd+K -> palette opens -> type -> pick -> closes) and feeds the Viewport and createHandle prop guidance.

contextSummary: Spark, leboncoin's open-source design system, rebuilds its Dialog and Drawer on Base UI with one file per part, narrows onOpenChange to a simpler signature, and re-exposes Dialog.createHandle as part of its own public API.
rankRationale: A major marketplace's design system rebuilding Dialog AND Drawer on Base UI with per-part files, deliberately narrowing onOpenChange's signature and re-exposing createHandle in its public API -- evidence of how corporate DS teams adapt Base UI's API surface. Chromatic Storybook is publicly linked. Feeds composition guidance and the 'design-system wrapper' archetype.

contextSummary: Dify's internal dify-ui package re-exports every Dialog part and styles Backdrop/Viewport/Popup with Tailwind driven by data-starting-style/data-ending-style transitions plus motion-reduce fallbacks -- CSS-transition animation done the documented Base UI way at 148k-star scale.
rankRationale: 148k-star production platform styling Backdrop/Viewport/Popup via data-starting-style/data-ending-style Tailwind transitions with motion-reduce fallbacks -- the documented CSS-transition animation contract applied at maximum scale, including the often-missed Viewport part. Feeds the animation section and data-attribute styling contract with a heavyweight citation.

contextSummary: Playroom (SEEK's component prototyping tool) wraps Dialog with initialFocus defaulting to the dialog heading ref and forwards finalFocus -- a small, sharp example of the focus-management props doing accessibility work.
rankRationale: Small and precise: initialFocus defaults to the dialog heading ref (so screen readers announce context first) and finalFocus is forwarded. The cleanest found illustration of the focus-management props; feeds the accessibility contract and prop-level guidance for initialFocus/finalFocus.

contextSummary: Whop's design system re-exports createHandle with a generic DialogHandle<T> payload type, surfaces keepMounted and Viewport, and builds its Drawer on the same Dialog primitives; dialog stories render in a public Storybook.
rankRationale: Whop's DS re-exports createHandle behind a generic DialogHandle<T> alias, surfaces keepMounted, and builds Drawer on Dialog -- with dialog stories in a public Storybook (storybook.whop.dev), rare live-story evidence. Feeds TypeScript guidance for typed handles and the keepMounted prop story.

contextSummary: GitButler's lite app implements a searchable PickerDialog: initialFocus lands on the filter input, a visually-hidden Dialog.Close keeps screen-reader users able to escape, and a ScrollArea renders the result list inside the Popup.
rankRationale: PickerDialog in a 21k-star git client: initialFocus on the search input, a visually-hidden Dialog.Close preserving SR escape, ScrollArea list inside the Popup. Recomposes into a 'searchable picker dialog' story (open -> type to filter -> arrow -> select -> closes); feeds a11y contract (hidden close) and cross-component composition (ScrollArea in Dialog).

contextSummary: Cambio is a dialog animation library built directly on Base UI: it runs motion.create() over every Dialog part so consumers compose spring-animated dialogs with the exact same part grammar.
rankRationale: An animation library whose entire surface is motion.create() applied to every Dialog part -- proof the render-prop/part grammar composes with Motion without adapters. Feeds the animation handbook section ('JavaScript animation libraries' path) and shows Base UI as a library-building substrate.

contextSummary: A PartyKit event-planning app that spreads the whole Dialog namespace into its own Dialog object but replaces Root with a version whose open state lives in the URL search params, keyed by declaration-merged dialog ids -- shareable/deep-linkable dialogs.
rankRationale: Replaces Root with a URL-search-param-driven Root (declaration-merged dialog ids) while spreading the rest of the namespace through -- shareable, deep-linkable dialog state in ~60 lines. Recomposes into a 'dialog state in the URL' story; feeds controlled-open guidance (open + onOpenChange with an external store).

contextSummary: GitHub-contributions poster generator: a shadcn-style wrapper plus product dialogs like AiConfigDialog, a bring-your-own-API-key settings form submitted from inside the dialog on the live site.
rankRationale: Live consumer product where dialogs are product features: AiConfigDialog is a bring-your-own-API-key settings form submitted inside the dialog. Recomposes into the 'settings form in a dialog' story (open settings -> fill key -> save -> closes, state persists); feeds forms-in-dialog guidance with a demoable public site.

contextSummary: Gear Protocol's wallet-connect package renders its wallet-picker modal through a shared default-dialog built on Base UI -- the web3 connect-wallet modal archetype on the old package name.
rankRationale: The web3 connect-wallet modal archetype: a wallet-connect package rendering its wallet picker through a shared default-dialog on the historical package name -- both a distinct product context (crypto wallet selection) and evidence of pre-1.0 adoption. Feeds when-to-use (choice modals) and the migration/rename narrative.

contextSummary: cmux (agent-orchestration product) keeps a deliberately thin Modal wrapper whose comment documents that Title/Description/Close wire through Base UI context, and uses it for leaf dialogs like the waitlist signup form.
rankRationale: A 23k-star product keeping the wrapper deliberately thin, with a comment documenting that Title/Description/Close wire through Base UI context -- evidence that the context plumbing is a selling point, not an implementation detail. Its waitlist dialog (open -> email form -> submit -> close) is a compact recomposable story for marketing-page dialogs.

contextSummary: Ships a dialog wrapper and a sheet/side-panel wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (packages/ui/src/components/dialog.tsx). Project: A one-of-a-kind resume builder that keeps your privacy in mind. Completely secure, customizable, portable, open-source and free forever. Try it out today!.
PostHog wraps Dialog as DialogPrimitive inside its Lemon UI frontend and again in the quill primitives package -- Base UI dialog at very large production scale.
Mastra's playground-ui design system wraps Dialog for the AI-agent framework's local playground.
Electric's agents-server UI has a standard Dialog wrapper plus a SearchPalette that hosts search/command UI in a bare Root+Backdrop+Popup composition.
Ships a dialog wrapper and a sheet/side-panel wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (packages/ui/src/components/sheet.tsx). Project: coss.com/ui is the official design system of Cal.com.
Typebot's shared ui package wraps Dialog for the chatbot-builder product.
Stagewise (in-browser agent toolbar) keeps a full shadcn-style dialog wrapper in its stage-ui kit.

Ships a dialog wrapper and a modal wrapper and a sheet/side-panel wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (packages/ui/src/react/primitives/dialog/index.tsx). Project: Emdash is the Open-Source Agentic Development Environment (🧡 YC W26). Run multiple coding agents in parallel. Use any provider.
Coral's internal 'wax' component library composes Dialog from per-part files (index re-exports Root/Portal, popup wraps Popup).

Ships a command-palette host and a dialog wrapper and a sheet/side-panel wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (apps/site/components/ui/sheet.tsx). Project: 🎯 All you need. Nothing you don't. Open source project management that works for you, not against you.
Animate UI ships a 'base' primitives registry whose dialog wires Base UI parts to its animation system -- a registry dedicated to animated variants of headless primitives.

Ships a dialog wrapper and a sheet/side-panel wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (registry/bases/base/ui/dialog.tsx). Project: Design-forward shadcn kit for interfaces that stand out. 1000+ free patterns!.
Cloudflare's Kumo design system builds both its Dialog component and its command palette on re-exported Base UI dialog primitives.
RedwoodSDK's official baseui playground renders a canonical ExampleDialog covering the full part tree.
Privacy-first analytics platform with shadcn-style dialog and sheet wrappers in its ui package.
Spell UI's command component hosts its palette in a Base UI Dialog opened via createHandle.

Ships a dialog wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (components/ui/dialog.tsx). Project: One URL for all your links, An open-source alternative to Linktree. Create a beautiful profile page to share all your important links in one place.
Ships a dialog wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (components/ui/dialog.tsx). Project: Free premium animated React components and micro-interactions built with Framer Motion and Tailwind CSS.
Ships a sheet/side-panel wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (components/ui/sheet.tsx). Project: Spinners, loaders and loading animations for modern web apps ⏳.

Ships a sheet/side-panel wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (src/components/ui/sheet.tsx). Project: A full-stack monorepo project built with NestJS (backend) and React (admin dashboard) 🚀 一个基于 NestJS 后端与 React 后台管理系统的全栈 Monorepo 项目.

Ships a dialog wrapper built on Base UI Dialog (components/ui/dialog.tsx). Project: Brand identity of brands for inspiration.

Deployed personal fork of Bluesky's app whose web Dialog layer re-exports Base UI's createHandle; the embed-consent dialog receives a handle prop and composes Root/Popup/Close. Included despite 0 stars for its distinctive handle-passed-as-prop pattern in a large real app codebase.
